summary: Vertical bystander phone footage of a detention scene inside an airport terminal, watermarked '@NICKVALENCIANEWS' with an Instagram handle overlay. A group of uniformed officers, some in vests, stand among travelers under the terminal's lit ceiling and columns while a person is held on the floor and others crouch nearby. A bystander records on a phone in the background. The audio is a person off camera shouting angrily at the officers. The tweet text describes the footage as a U.S. citizen and her daughter taken into ICE custody at San Francisco Airport. No music or graphics other than the watermark.

script.scene: Airport terminal interior with columns and recessed lighting; several uniformed officers stand in a loose circle around a person on the floor as travelers look on.
Closer view of officers crouched over the person on the ground; a bystander films with a phone; '@NICKVALENCIANEWS' watermark at lower left.
